title: blepharipappus platyglossus
intro: Blepharipappus platyglossus, also known as the Wyoming fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the western United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Blepharipappus platyglossus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in tincture form, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
